body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
@a-charbon found that in some cases the SW_d and LW_d from ERA5 can be very small but negative. Since this is not physical, we clip them to be positive now.

I also realized that using the low res clm data doesnt really make sense - it is small enough to download via the artifacts - Ill double check -, and because it is only on the surface space, it is not too slow to regrid to the simulation grid to start the simulation.

@imreddyTeja do you see any reason why we should keep use_lowres_clm? should I just replace it by "false" everywhere and get rid of the function?


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: Clip LWd and SWd to be positive; use hi res maps
